subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-06 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: He [Kayvan Mirza] wished to attain the presence of Baha'u'llah at midnight, through the intermediation of Mirza Muhit and in the utmost secrecy
subcodes.first_line_orig: بواسطهٴ میرزا محیط خواست در کمال خفا نصف شب بحضور مبارک مشرّف شود چون این استدعای شاهزاده
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @non-participation in politics, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
